context: 2015 in the Netherlands was dominated by tropical house and feel-good remixes, with Felix Jaehn's remix of Omi's 'Cheerleader' topping the year-end chart. Dutch act Kenny B crossed over nationally with his Portuguese-influenced ballad 'Parijs', while Lost Frequencies and Kygo represented the melodic EDM wave sweeping Europe. Mark Ronson and Bruno Mars' funk revival 'Uptown Funk!' was a year-round staple.

tracks.title: Lean On
tracks.artist: Major Lazer & DJ Snake feat. MØ
